title: Strep pull down assay
description:
{"blocks":[{"key":"1k6n7","text":"Strep pull down assay for FIP200(NTD)-TSF WT or mutants were co-transfected with GST-ATG13(363-517) and/or ULK1(MIT)-MBP 


","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Transfect 10 ml HEK GNTi cells at concentration of 2 × 10^6 cells/ml
In a separate tube, dilute DNA with Hybridoma-SFM(1X)
Add PEI to DNA dilution. Incubate mixture for 00:30:00 at 37 °C
Add mixture to cells. Let cells grow for 48:00:00
Wash pellet with cold PBS. Store pellet at -80 °C until purification.
Homogenize the pellets in 0.5 ml of lysis buffer/protease inhibitors/1% TritonX-100, and clarified after 40000 x g, °C, , 00:15:00 .
Wash the beads four times, and eluted in 50 μl lysis buffer/4 mM desthiobiotin.
Mix 18 μl eluent with lithium dodecylsulfate (LDS)/BME buffer, heated at 60 °C for 00:05:00 and subjected to SDS/PAGE gel. The gel was then stained with Coomassie brilliant blue G250.
Incubate the lysate with 30 μl Strep-Tactin Sepharose resin (IBA-Lifesciences) at 4 °C for 03:00:00
creator: Minghao Chen
